title: Blaze the Firefighter
alt_text: Free printable firefighter bear coloring page for preschoolers

faq.a: Designed for ages 3-5 with bold, simple lines.
Download the PDF and print on standard 8.5x11 paper.

title: Rosie the Doctor
alt_text: Free printable doctor rabbit coloring page for preschoolers

faq.q: Can this be used in classrooms?
faq.a: Yes, this page is classroom-friendly for early learners.
Standard printer paper works, but cardstock is great for markers.

title: Self-Care Bath Scene
alt_text: Free printable cozy bath self-care coloring page

faq.q: Who is this page designed for?
faq.a: This sample page is designed for adult colorists who enjoy cozy themes.
Yes. Use a backing sheet if your markers bleed.

title: Self-Care Reading Nook
alt_text: Free printable cozy reading nook coloring page

faq.q: Is this from the Cozy Girl book?
faq.a: Yes, this page is a free sample from Cozy Girl Self-Care Coloring Book.

faq.q: What paper size should I print?
faq.a: Print on standard US Letter (8.5x11) paper.
